Session Architecture

Pricing & Format

Profineart Studio Basel provides private art instruction exclusively in English. Training is conducted in individual sessions for maximum comfort.

2 Sessions

90 min
1 x 2 Sessions100 CHF
5 x 2 Sessions485 CHF
10 x 2 Sessions955 CHF

Each visit consists of 90 minutes of focused instruction 45 + 45 minutes.

1.5 Sessions

70 min
1 x 1.5 Session80 CHF
5 x 1.5 Sessions390 CHF
10 x 1.5 Sessions 765 CHF

Each visit consists of 70 minutes of focused instruction.

1 Session

45 min
1 x 1 Session60 CHF
5 x 1 Sessions290 CHF
10 x 1 Sessions565 CHF

Each visit consists of 45 minutes of focused instruction.

Student Levels & Learning Approach

Courses at ProFineArt Studio Basel are suitable for all skill levels, from complete beginners to advanced practitioners. Students select courses according to their current experience, goals, and interests. Introductory courses are available for those starting from zero and may include supportive learning tools and structured guidance. Advanced courses focus on observational drawing, material understanding, and independent artistic decision-making without auxiliary technical aids.

Learning Format & Student Responsibility

The educational format requires active participation, concentration, and personal engagement from the student. Lessons are practice-oriented and structured around observation, analysis, and hands-on work.

Course Catalog & Direct BookingView full curriculum details and initiate direct orders for sessions here.
→
Booking & Payment

During the online booking of the picked course, you will be able to book the date and time, mentioning your location, address, contact and any additional information.

Package Refunds

While single trial lessons are final, multi-lesson packages offer flexibility. If for any reason the full package cannot be completed, a refund for any remaining unused units is available upon request.

Service Area

Individual lessons are available in the town of Basel at the client's home or studio. Travel is included within a 25 km radius of Basel (Basel-Land, northern Aargau, border towns of Germany and France).

↑
